tags.name: partial-header
tags.description:
A header component used for section titles with support for primary, secondary, and tertiary Material color variants.

Attributes:

  * `heading-text` {`string`} - The text to display within the header.

  * `header-type` {`"primary" | "secondary" | "tertiary" | "inverse"`} - The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

Properties:

  * `styles` - 

  * `headingText` {`string`} - The text to display within the header.

  * `headerType` {`"primary" | "secondary" | "tertiary" | "inverse"`} - The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

attributes.name: heading-text
attributes.description:
`heading-text` {`string`} - The text to display within the header.

Property: headingText

Default:

attributes.name: header-type
attributes.description:
`header-type` {`"primary" | "secondary" | "tertiary" | "inverse"`} - The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

Property: headerType

Default: primary
